title: Dark Blue Ribbon 25mm for Gift Wrapping 22M, Double Sided Navy Blue Satin Ribbon 25mm Thick Fabric Ribbon for Crafting Cake Ribbon,Hair Bow Ribbon,Christmas Decoration,Wedding Car Ribbon
features: 🎀MATERIALS: Ribbon Satin Ribbon Set are made of polyester fabric, smooth and comfortable texture.
🎁SIZE&PACKAGE: One Ribbon rolls Width:22mm /Length: 22m,Total length about: 22 meters,Variety of colors are available for all your needs.

🎀WIDELY USE: Satin Ribbon 10mm Wide Good for many type of craft and decoration such as Christmas craft and present wrapping, scrapbook, packaging design, Christmas tree,clothing, hair bows,hair accessories, card making, gift packaging, party favor, hair bow, sewing, floral projects.
🎁EASY TO USE: Solid Fabric Ribbons Roll will fray when cut. Our best tip for cutting ribbon is to use really good quality scissors (new if possible) and cut the ribbon at an angle.

🎀100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE: After Sale Service If you have any issue about Ribbon for Gift Wrapping please contact us at any time, we will answer you within 24 hours and find a best solution for you.
description: This high quality satin ribbon from ATBEAMEN is ideal for giving a special touch to your gifts on special occasions such as Christmas. With a width of 25mm and made of polyester, it offers durability and wrinkle resistance. Its dark blue color and smooth finish make it versatile and easy to match any type of packaging or decor. Also, it is perfect for crafts, such as creating baby shower memories and decorative braids. Don't hesitate to add this beautiful ornament to your packages and see the difference it makes!
